questions:
=== NOVELTY SUMMARY ===
Primary Novel Feature: The invention presents a novel light extraction structure in an optical waveguide for a display device.
Supporting Features:
- Dot pattern geometry with varying shape, size gradient, depth, and spacing
- Governing equation or mathematical model defining the extraction pattern
- Luminance uniformity maintenance across operating modes and measured uniformity %

=== QUESTIONS ===
[Structural design and optical architecture]
1. Can you provide a top view diagram of the overall light extraction structure? (Drawings/Diagrams)
2. How does the waveguide design contribute to efficient light extraction in this structure? (Governing equations/Mathematical models)

[Light extraction structure]
1. Can you provide a cross-sectional view of the dot pattern geometry in the waveguide? (Drawings/Diagrams)
2. How does the shape, size gradient, depth, and spacing of the dots affect light extraction efficiency? (Governing equations/Mathematical models)
3. What is the governing equation or mathematical model defining the light extraction pattern in this structure? (Governing equations/Mathematical models)

[Luminance uniformity]
1. How does the device maintain luminance uniformity across all operating modes? (Governing equations/Mathematical models)
2. Can you provide a measurement of the measured uniformity % in different operating modes? (Measured values)
